faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Jericho typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method required. We offer free inspections to provide accurate quotes and can often accommodate same-day service for urgent cases.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Jericho homes?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Jericho take 2-4 hours for an average home, with heat treatments often completed in a single visit. Chemical treatments may require a follow-up appointment 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for families and pets in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments are EPA-approved and safe when applied by our licensed professionals. Heat treatments are chemical-free and immediately safe, while our low-toxicity chemical applications require only 2-4 hours before re-entry. We provide detailed safety instructions for all Jericho customers.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day bed bug service in Jericho, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer same-day and emergency bed bug treatment services throughout Jericho and surrounding Long Island communities. Given the rapid reproduction rate of bed bugs, we prioritize quick response times and can typically schedule service within 24 hours of your call.
